---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that might help.
